fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact. If the contact is a person, you can click the field to see the Name Details window.

fields.name: Search Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.

fields.name: Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's address.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city where the contact is located.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's phone number.

fields.name: Telex No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the contact's telex number.
If you have selected the Inherit Communication Details field in the Marketing Setup window, each time you enter a new contact person for an existing company the program will fill in this field by copying the telex number of the company from the Telex No. field in the Contact table.

fields.name: Territory Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the territory code for the contact.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the contact.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the language that is used when translating specified text on documents to foreign business partner, such as an item description on an order confirmation.

fields.name: Registration Number
fields.tooltip: Specifies the registration number of the contact. You can enter a maximum of 20 characters, both numbers and letters.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the salesperson who normally handles this contact.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies if comments have been entered concerning the contact.
To view a comment or create a new one, click Related Information, point to Contact, and then click Comments. A window then appears that displays existing comments and allow you to create new ones.
You can also enter a comment in Notes FactBox.

fields.name: Format Region
fields.tooltip: Specifies the format region that is used when formatting dates and numbers on documents to foreign business partner, such as an total amount on an order date.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date when the contact card was last modified. This field is not editable.
When you change information on the contact card, the program automatically updates the Last Date Modified field to show the current system date.

fields.name: Fax No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's fax number.

fields.name: Telex Answer Back
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the contact's telex answer back number.
If you have selected the Inherit Communication Details field in the Marketing Setup window, each time you enter a new contact person for an existing company the program will fill in this field by copying the telex answer back number of the company from the Telex Answer Back field in the Contact table.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's VAT registration number. This field is valid for companies only.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's email.

fields.name: Home Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's web site.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that is used to assign numbers to contacts. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Image
fields.tooltip: Specifies the picture of the contact, for example, a photograph if the contact is a person, or a logo if the contact is a company.

fields.name: Privacy Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to limit access to data for the data subject during daily operations. This is useful, for example, when protecting data from changes while it is under privacy review.

fields.name: Minor
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the person's age is below the definition of adulthood as recognized by law. Data for minors is blocked until a parent or guardian of the minor provides parental consent. You unblock the data by choosing the Parental Consent Received check box.

fields.name: Parental Consent Received
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a parent or guardian of the minor has provided their consent to allow the minor to use this service. When this check box is selected, data for the minor can be processed.

fields.name: Coupled to Dataverse
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the contact is coupled to a contact in Dataverse.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of contact, either company or person.

fields.name: Company No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number for the contact's company.

fields.name: Company Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the company. If the contact is a person, it specifies the name of the company for which this contact works.

fields.name: Lookup Contact No.
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: First Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's first name and is valid for contact persons only.

fields.name: Middle Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's middle name and is valid for contact persons only.

fields.name: Surname
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's surname and is valid for contact persons only.

fields.name: Job Title
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's job title, and is valid for contact persons only.

fields.name: Initials
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's initials, when the contact is a person.

fields.name: Extension No.
fields.tooltip: Contains the contact's extension number.

fields.name: Mobile Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's mobile telephone number.

fields.name: Pager
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact's pager number.

fields.name: Organizational Level Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the organizational code for the contact, for example, top management. This field is valid for persons only.

fields.name: Exclude from Segment
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the contact should be excluded from segments:

fields.name: Date Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a date filter.
If this field contains the starting and ending dates for a time period, fields such as No. of Interactions, Cost (LCY) and Duration (Min.) will display information for that time period only.
You can enter a date or a time interval. There are certain rules for how dates should be entered.

fields.name: Next Task Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the next task involving the contact.

fields.name: Last Date Attempted
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the contact was last contacted, for example, when you tried to call the contact, with or without success. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Date of Last Interaction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the last interaction involving the contact, for example, a received or sent mail, e-mail, or phone call. This field is not editable.

fields.name: No. of Job Responsibilities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of job responsibilities for this contact. This field is valid for persons only and is not editable.

fields.name: No. of Industry Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of industry groups to which the contact belongs. When the contact is a person, this field contains the number of industry groups for the contact's company. This field is not editable.

fields.name: No. of Business Relations
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of business relations (for example, customer, vendor, consultant, competitor, and so on) your company has with this contact. When the contact is a person, this field contains the number of business relations for the contact's company. This field is not editable.
To see a list of the assigned business relations, click the field.

fields.name: No. of Mailing Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of mailing groups for this contact.

fields.name: External ID
fields.tooltip:
Contains the contact's external ID.
You use this field to register the external ID of contacts that have been imported from another database.

fields.name: No. of Interactions
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of interactions created for this contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total cost of all the interactions involving the contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Duration (Min.)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total duration of all the interactions involving the contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: No. of Opportunities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of open opportunities involving the contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Estimated Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total estimated value of all the opportunities involving the contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Calcd. Current Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total calculated current value of all the opportunities involving the contact. The field is not editable.

fields.name: Opportunity Entry Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies that one or more opportunities are linked to the contact.

fields.name: Task Entry Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies that one or more to-dos are linked to the contact.

fields.name: Salesperson Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a salesperson filter.
If this field contains a salesperson code, fields such as No. of Interactions, Cost (LCY) and Duration (Min.) will display information linked to that particular salesperson.

fields.name: Campaign Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a campaign filter.
If this field contains a campaign number, fields such as No. of Interactions, Cost (LCY) and Duration (Min.) will display information linked to that particular campaign.

fields.name: Contact Business Relation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the existing business relation.

fields.name: Action Taken Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies an action taken filter. There are six options:
Next

Previous

Updated

Jumped

Won

Lost


For example, if this field contains the option Next, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value (LCY) only display information related to opportunities for which that particular action was taken.

fields.name: Sales Cycle Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a sales cycle filter.
If this field contains a sales cycle code, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value will display information linked to opportunities created using that particular sales cycle.

fields.name: Sales Cycle Stage Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a sales cycle stage filter.
If this field contains a sales cycle stage code, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value will display information linked to opportunities created using that particular sales cycle stage.

fields.name: Probability % Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a probability filter.
If this field contains a percent, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value will display information linked to opportunities having that particular probability.

fields.name: Completed % Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a completed percentage filter.
If this field contains a percent, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value will display information linked to opportunities with that percentage of completion.

fields.name: Estimated Value Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains an estimated value filter.
If this field contains an amount (LCY), fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value will display information linked to opportunities with that particular estimated value.

fields.name: Calcd. Current Value Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a calculated current value filter.
If this field contains an amount (LCY), fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value will display information linked to opportunities with that particular calculated current value.

fields.name: Chances of Success % Filter
fields.tooltip:
Contains a chances of success filter.
If this field contains a percent, fields such as No. of Opportunities and Estimated Value will display information linked to opportunities with that particular chance of success.

fields.name: Task Status Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a to-do status filter. There are five options:

Not Started


In Progress


Completed


Waiting


Postponed


For example, if this field contains the option Postponed, fields such as Next To-do Date will display information linked to postponed to-dos.

fields.name: Task Closed Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a closed to-do filter.
If this field contains Yes, fields such as Next To-do Date will only display information related to closed to-dos.

fields.name: Priority Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a priority filter. There are three options: Low, Normal, and High.
For example, if this field contains the option High, fields such as Next To-do Date will only display information linked to to-dos with a high priority.

fields.name: Team Filter
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a team filter.
If this field contains a team code, fields such as Next To-do Date only displays information linked to to-dos handled by that particular team.

fields.name: Close Opportunity Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies a filter for closed opportunities.

fields.name: Correspondence Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the preferred type of correspondence for the interaction.

fields.name: Salutation Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the salutation code that will be used when you interact with the contact. The salutation code is only used in Word documents. To see a list of the salutation codes already defined, click the field.

fields.name: Search E-Mail
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the contact's e-mail address in upper case.
The field is filled out automatically and is only used internally by the program.

fields.name: Last Time Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the contact was last modified.

fields.name: E-Mail 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies a secondary email address for a contact. You can use this field to provide an alternative email address.
